---
title: 'Kingdom of God Duplication'
date: '2010-01-15T05:24:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3148121476732357236'
blogger_filename: '/2010/01/kingdom-of-god-duplication.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

01.14.10<br /><br />Mathew 10<br /><br />Genesis 1:28 tell us that the Blessing is to cause us to:&nbsp; <br /><i><br /></i><br /><i><sup class="versenum" id="en-NKJV-28">28</sup> Then God blessed them, and God said to them, “Be <b>fruitful</b> and <b>multiply</b>; <b>fill the earth</b> and <b>subdue it</b>; <b>have dominion</b> over the fish of the sea, over the birds of the air, and over every living thing that moves on the earth.”</i><br /><br />So the anointing on your life should:<br /><ol><li><i>Bear Fruit so others can benefit</i></li><li><i>Be multiplied into others bearing the same fruit</i></li><li><i>Fill the earth with this fruit+multiplication=Filling formula</i></li></ol>&nbsp;Jesus has born fruit and now here He is multiplying that fruit to others. His disciples are being sent out to take the fruit that was His and they, once being partakers of the fruit, or now distributors of the fruit. This is the process of Kingdom Growth.<br /><br />They are being sent with this Instruction. Gentleman Your:<br /><ul><li>Message: The Kingdom of God is HERE!</li><li>Confirmation: Healing, signs, wonders.</li><li>Authority: Give or take back your Shalom (Peace, nothing missing, nothing broken everything whole and complete. Imagine that! These and now us, have the right to command SHALOM to come on a home or leave it based on how they receive HIM, by extension His through us.)</li><li>Responsibility: Wise AND Harmless</li><li>Result: Testimony before many</li><li>Trust: You'll have the words to say</li><li>Warning: It's ugly out there, they'll hate you. (Especially religious folks)</li><li>Help: Queit still small voice whispering instruction in prayer to be voiced out loud.</li><li>Promise: God sees, cares, provides.</li><li>Clarification: Sword now... Peace on earth is later in round TWO!</li><li>Family: May not like you for your dedication</li><li>Loyalty: Jesus Alone!</li><li>Reward: Received from God! And People can share in your reward by helping!</li><li>Goal: Provide for those who cannot provide for themselves. Spiritually, Physically, and Financially.&nbsp;</li></ul>Thoughts to live by.&nbsp; <br /><br />Darrell G. Wolfe <br /><i><br /></i><br /><i><br /></i><br /><i><br /></i><br /><i><br /></i>
